text_raw: Our paths will cross once more, in greater shadow.
text_clean: Our paths will cross once more, in greater shadow.

text_raw: You may leave this place, but the darkness will follow.
text_clean: You may leave this place, but the darkness will follow.

text_raw: I yearn to watch you quiver in dread.
text_clean: I yearn to watch you quiver in dread.

text_raw: Whether the cold claims you or I do, your doom is certain.
text_clean: Whether the cold claims you or I do, your doom is certain.

text_raw: Who dares bring light into my eternal night? Snuff it out and kneel!
text_clean: Who dares bring light into my eternal night? Snuff it out and kneel!

text_raw: A beating heart is no requirement to serve my will.
text_clean: A beating heart is no requirement to serve my will.

text_raw: Submit, and I shall deliver you from your pain.
text_clean: Submit, and I shall deliver you from your pain.

text_raw: Allow me to relish the flavor of your pain.
text_clean: Allow me to relish the flavor of your pain.
